H2: Equipment Decal FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Equipment Decals

Durable & Weatherproof Equipment Decals for Industrial & Commercial Use

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Design custom equipment decals for your machinery, tools, and industrial equipment. Select your size, upload your artwork, and create professional-grade equipment identification decals. Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Equipment Decal Solutions

Create durable equipment decals designed for industrial and commercial environments. Our weatherproof vinyl equipment decals withstand harsh conditions while providing clear identification, branding, and safety information for machinery, tools, and equipment. Perfect for construction companies, rental businesses, manufacturing facilities, and maintenance operations. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

These custom equipment decals are printed on high-quality vinyl material that resists fading, cracking, and peeling even in demanding outdoor conditions. Whether you need equipment serial number labels, company branding decals, or safety warning indicators, our equipment decals deliver professional results that last.

Available in multiple cut options including die-cut for precise shapes, kiss-cut for easy application, and transfer-cut for detailed designs. Choose from various sizes to fit your specific equipment marking needs.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Equipment Decal Order Process & Design Options

Design Process

Create your custom equipment decals using our online design tool or upload your own artwork. Choose from clipart options or upload logos, serial numbers, and text to create professional equipment identification decals. Our design system supports both simple text-based equipment labels and complex multi-color designs with graphics and company branding.

If you upload an original file instead of using our design tool, submit an .eps file for the highest quality results. This ensures your equipment decals print with crisp text and sharp graphics that remain legible on machinery and tools.

Payment

All equipment decal orders require full payment before production begins. We accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards, as well as company checks which must clear before your decals enter production.

Live Order Tracking

Track your equipment decal order through every production stage with our Live Order Tracking system. After placing your order, you'll receive a unique tracking number via email that provides real-time updates from order placement through delivery. Check your order status anytime by clicking the tracking link in your confirmation email.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Equipment Decal Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production schedule ranges from one to five business days, allowing you to choose the timeline that meets your equipment marking needs. Production time begins once file upload is complete and proof approval is received.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Fast turnaround for urgent equipment decal orders. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day. Emergency same-day production available in select cases - contact customer service for availability. Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.

2 Business Days Express Production

Ideal when you need equipment decals quickly but have an extra day for production. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day. Emergency production available in some cases. Production timing starts from file upload completion and proof approval.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular equipment decal production option, offering fast turnaround at no additional cost. Perfect for most custom equipment marking projects. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the next business day. Turnaround starts from completed file upload and proof approval.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Cost-effective option when equipment decals aren't needed urgently. Save money while still receiving high-quality custom equipment identification decals. Production begins the business day following order approval after 5:00 PM CST. Timeline includes proof approval and file upload completion.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Die-Cut, Kiss-Cut & Transfer-Cut Equipment Decals

Choose the cutting method that best suits your equipment decal application. Each cut type offers different backing paper behavior and application characteristics for various equipment marking needs.

Die-Cut Equipment Decals

Die-cut equipment decals are cut completely through both the vinyl and backing paper, creating individually shaped decals with no excess material. Like a cookie cutter, your equipment decals are precisely cut to match your design contour. Perfect for equipment serial numbers, company logos, and warning labels that need clean, professional edges. Back slit (crack and peel) feature available on standard and permanent materials for easier application on curved equipment surfaces.

Kiss-Cut Equipment Decals

Kiss-cut equipment decals are cut through only the vinyl layer, leaving the backing paper intact around your design. This creates a border of backing material that makes equipment decals easier to handle and position during application. Ideal for equipment decals that will be applied to flat machinery surfaces or when you need extra material for gripping during installation.

Transfer-Cut Equipment Decals

Transfer-cut equipment decals involve cutting vinyl to specific shapes, then removing unwanted material and applying transfer tape over the remaining design. This method works best for detailed equipment lettering, intricate logos, and multi-piece designs. The transfer tape holds all pieces together for clean application of complex equipment identification graphics. Requires vector files (EPS or Adobe Illustrator format). Transfer cutting includes 8 standard picks with up to 40 picks per square foot. Additional picks charged $0.02-$0.04 per pick based on complexity.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Equipment Decal Artwork Requirements & File Setup

Preferred File Types

For the best equipment decal printing results, submit Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated Post Script) or PDF files. Maximum file size is 100 MB. When submitting these files for equipment decal production, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to ensure accurate printing and prevent font substitution that could affect equipment identification text.

Additional File Formats

We also accept high-resolution JPG, TIFF, and PNG files for equipment decal printing. These formats work well for photographic equipment decals or designs that don't require vector precision. Ensure sufficient resolution for clear printing at your intended equipment decal size.

File Setup Tips

Set up artwork files proportionate to your exact equipment decal order size. Convert all text to outlines to prevent font issues during equipment decal production. Allow for bleed only when necessary for full-coverage designs. Never flatten or merge layers in PSD files. Clearly indicate cut lines for all equipment decal products to ensure proper manufacturing.

Transfer Cut Guidelines

Transfer-cut equipment decals require special file preparation. Use simple, open fonts for equipment lettering. All text must be at least 1/2" tall for reliable cutting. Maintain 1/8" minimum spacing between characters and design elements. Main strokes and line weights should be at least 1/8" wide. Minimum pick size is 1/8". We recommend requesting a proof for complex transfer-cut equipment decals to ensure design feasibility.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Equipment Decal Shipping & Delivery Information

Equipment decal shipping time is separate from production time. Your total delivery timeline includes both manufacturing and shipping duration. We provide tracking information for all equipment decal shipments.

Shipping Methods

Choose from standard ground shipping for cost-effective equipment decal delivery, or expedited shipping options when you need decals faster. Ground shipping typically takes 3-7 business days depending on your location. Express shipping options available for 1-2 day delivery of equipment decals to most locations.

Shipping Time Expectations

Remember that production time and shipping time are calculated separately. A 3-day production equipment decal order with standard ground shipping will take 6-10 total business days from order approval to delivery. Plan accordingly when ordering equipment decals for specific project deadlines.

Important Shipping Notes

Large equipment decal orders may ship in multiple packages depending on size and quantity. We provide tracking numbers for all shipments. International equipment decal shipping available to most countries with additional transit time and customs considerations. Contact customer service for international shipping quotes and delivery estimates.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Equipment Decal Installation & Application Guide

Proper installation ensures your equipment decals adhere correctly and last longer in demanding industrial environments. Follow these steps for professional equipment decal application on machinery, tools, and equipment surfaces.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the equipment surface thoroughly with isopropyl alcohol or degreasing solution to remove dirt, oil, and residue. Allow the surface to dry completely before applying equipment decals. Smooth, non-porous surfaces like painted metal, plastic housings, and glass work best for equipment decal adhesion. Avoid applying decals to heavily textured, dirty, or freshly painted equipment surfaces.

Applying the Equipment Decal

Position your equipment decal carefully before removing the backing paper. For larger equipment decals, remove backing paper gradually while smoothing the decal onto the surface to prevent air bubbles. Use a squeegee or application tool to ensure complete contact between the decal and equipment surface. Work from the center outward to eliminate trapped air.

Transfer Tape Removal

For transfer-cut equipment decals, wait a few minutes after application before slowly removing the transfer tape at a 45-degree angle. If any decal pieces lift with the transfer tape, press them back down and wait longer before attempting removal. Properly applied transfer-cut equipment decals will remain on the surface when transfer tape is removed.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Equipment Decals?

Equipment decals are durable vinyl labels designed for identifying, branding, and marking industrial machinery, tools, and commercial equipment. Made from weatherproof vinyl materials, these decals resist fading, cracking, and peeling in outdoor environments and demanding work conditions. Equipment decals are commonly used for asset identification, safety warnings, company branding, serial numbers, and maintenance information on construction equipment, manufacturing machinery, rental tools, and facility equipment.

Custom Equipment Decals for Your Business Needs

Design professional equipment decals that enhance your company's equipment identification and branding efforts. Our custom equipment decals work perfectly for construction companies marking heavy machinery, rental businesses identifying tools, manufacturing facilities labeling production equipment, and maintenance departments organizing assets. With multiple sizes, cutting options, and material choices, you can create equipment decals that meet your specific industrial marking requirements.

Order your custom equipment decals today and receive durable, professional-grade identification solutions designed for real-world equipment applications. Our custom hard hat stickers complement equipment decals for complete workplace identification systems.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Equipment Decal FAQs

What material is used for your equipment decals?

Our equipment decals are made from high-quality vinyl material designed for durability in industrial environments. The vinyl resists fading, cracking, and weather damage, making it ideal for equipment exposed to outdoor conditions, moisture, and temperature changes.

What types of surfaces can equipment decals stick to?

Equipment decals adhere best to clean, smooth surfaces like painted metal, plastic equipment housings, glass, and non-porous materials. They work well on machinery, tools, vehicle equipment, and most industrial surfaces when properly prepared and applied.

Are these equipment decals weatherproof?

Yes, our equipment decals are designed to withstand outdoor conditions including rain, sun exposure, and temperature fluctuations. The weatherproof vinyl construction ensures your equipment identification remains visible and intact in demanding work environments.

How long do equipment decals last on machinery?

Equipment decals typically last 3-5 years on outdoor machinery and equipment when applied to clean, appropriate surfaces. Indoor equipment decals can last even longer, with the actual lifespan depending on environmental conditions and surface preparation quality.

Can I remove equipment decals without damaging the surface?

Equipment decals can be removed from most surfaces, though some adhesive residue may remain depending on how long the decal was applied and environmental exposure. Use heat and adhesive remover for easier removal from valuable equipment surfaces.

What cut option works best for equipment serial numbers?

Die-cut equipment decals work excellently for serial numbers and identification text, providing clean edges without excess material. Kiss-cut decals offer easier handling for serial number applications, while transfer-cut works best for detailed equipment lettering and logos.

Do you offer bulk pricing for large equipment decal orders?

Yes, we provide volume discounts for large equipment decal orders. Contact our customer service team for bulk pricing quotes when ordering equipment decals for entire machinery fleets or facility-wide equipment marking projects.
